function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: Linked invoices for your startup partner
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_30__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_02__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_04__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
---
Hi Miles,

Sharing the oldest 3 invoices linked to the founder you talk product with.

Attached:
- INV-0001 (2025-11-04)
- INV-0002 (2025-12-02)
- INV-0003 (2025-12-30)

Best,
Assistant

next_step.current_state: Outbox write is final and appears valid: attachments are read files and ordered newest-first, recipient matches canonical Miles email, no YAML colon-hazard values present. Next required cleanup is deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Outbound draft was written to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: inbox note processed, outbound draft created with requested invoice set, inbox item removed.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing the requested reply action.

function.message: Processed the inbound request: resolved the referenced founder as Nina Schreiber, prepared a reply draft to Miles with the 3 oldest linked invoices attached (ordered newest-first in the attachment list per outbox rule), and removed the handled inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Completed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, AGENTS, context), followed inbox/email workflows, verified sender identity via canonical entity primary_contact_email, used canonical entity resolution for the referenced founder, wrote one outbox record, and deleted inbox item only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox frontmatter requested a reply with linked invoices. Sender matched canonical Miles email. Entity resolution identified Nina Schreiber as startup partner. Linked invoice records were identified in invoices lane; the three oldest were attached in the outbound draft, with attachment order kept newest-first as required by outbox policy. No security trigger (URL/credential/prompt-injection/exfiltration mismatch) was found in the read source content.
